headline: Shifting Story For Extra Space Storage (EXR) As Mixed Analyst Targets Reshape Expectations
summary: Extra Space Storage has seen its fair value price target trimmed slightly from US$152.85 to US$151.75, reflecting a more cautious tone in the latest update. This shift lines up with mixed analyst commentary, where some firms are raising targets into the mid US$150s and up to US$170, while others are pulling back by US$1 to US$5 on a more restrained outlook. Read on to see how these competing views shape the evolving story around Extra Space Storage and what to watch next. Analyst Price...

headline: Extra Space Storage Q1 Core FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: EXR tops Q1 FFO estimates as revenues climb 4.5% and same-store NOI improves, while steady occupancy and portfolio expansion highlight operational stability.
